name: Cheese Wafers....frances Lucas
recipeIngredient: heavy pinch of cayenne pepper (I used quite a bit)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cheese, butter, salt, and cayenne pepper.
2. Gradually add the flour to the mixture.
3. Form the dough into a roll and wrap it in waxed paper.
4. Freeze or refrigerate until ready to use.
5. Slice the roll into thin wafers.
6. Place pecans on top of the wafers.
7. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes, or at 475°F for 10 minutes.
